meta.title: Understanding TRM and HRM
meta.description:
Thanks to Runpod for sponsoring compute, affiliate link: https://runpod.io?ref=jmfkcdio

In this video I talk about HRM and TRM and how they work for solving ARC tasks and what we might learn for more broadly for LLMs and machine learning
